texto: It is a wonderful morning with the sun shining bright and flowers smiling. There is a sweet breeze kissing my face while a hot cup of coffee warms my heart and awakens my mind. The primordial songs of ocean waves are soothing my soul. I am not on earth
autor: I am in heaven on earth.
explicacao: Citação de I am in heaven on earth. sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “It is a wonderful morning with the sun shining bright and flowers smiling. There is a sweet breez…” articula reflexao, debasish-mridha, wonderful em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como bom-dia e reflexao.
